reviews.review_description: I was in code 1 around 2:30 est, and there was this admin that was talking to people. I walked up to him and told him about this player to be on the lookout for because he was saying slurs . He then proceeded to cuss me out because i “should just report it to the discord.” which I understand but the way he told me that was very disrespectful. I left after couple minutes after. The only reason that I’m not giving this 1 star is because the game is pretty good.

I remember back in january this game peaked but it was a shame that a lot of people didn't know how to install apks, this game now is the closest thing to silly cars humor🫩✌️ WHY DID YOU NEED TO REVAMP EVERYTHING, IT WAS PERFECT, THE SUMMONS, THE BACKROOMS, EVERYTHING, now its all gone, not to mention that the mods are like litlle kids with autism like they make weird sounds and doing weird things, you can ban me because i insulted "your mods" but it doesn't matter, this game is so bad now, but there was once a time...
SO FUN UNTIL IT GOT Taken DOWN BY META😭😭

reviews.review_title: Peak, add/fix,and way to update the game
reviews.review_description: This game is so great and me and my friends all play it every day, we need more summonings and can you go back to regular movement or like tone down the ability to jump high cause Miku, God, and galaxy all were easy to beat in running but no that you jump higher and easily it happens your suspended in the the air for like 1 second which is crucial time to run away so make it to where you don’t jump as high or easily now I get it if you need to scale but running needs to be faster and add punch mod this will make it so fun with friends, add new cosmetics, new summonings and maps like clouds Also if you need help with updating your game go to your library apps press, hover on sleeping the 3 dots press on them go to settings and at the top of your screen it says release Chanel’s you press on that and make sure the update but is on live

Devs you outdone yourself the maps are cool the monsters are amazing and the summons are class but THERES one thing we need PURGATORY AND RAMPAGE please add these back and the game will be better than what it is now
If the game gets taken down could you re release it with new photos and a cover on the meta store played since the gtag maps still existed when it was on itch io love your game and bye
